scripts.build:full: pyinstaller backend.spec --clean --noconfirm && mkdir -p backend-dist && cp dist/backend.exe backend-dist/ && cd frontend && npm run electron:compile && npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json && cd ..
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && npx asar extract dist-electron/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar dist-electron/app-extracted && rm -rf dist-electron/app-extracted/dist && cp -r dist dist-electron/app-extracted/ && npx asar pack dist-electron/app-extracted dist-electron/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar && rm -rf dist-electron/app-extracted && cd ..
scripts.build:electron: cd frontend && npm run electron:compile && npx asar extract dist-electron/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar dist-electron/app-extracted && cp electron/dist/main.js dist-electron/app-extracted/electron/dist/main.js && npx asar pack dist-electron/app-extracted dist-electron/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar && rm -rf dist-electron/app-extracted && cd ..
scripts.build:backend: pyinstaller backend.spec --clean --noconfirm && mkdir -p backend-dist && cp dist/backend.exe backend-dist/
